CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3.name: CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3
CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3.brief: Pipeline for piecewise planar surface reconstruction from a point cloud via inside/outside labeling of a kinetic partition using min-cut.
CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3.detailed: GeomTraits must be a model of KineticShapePartitionTraits_3 . PointRange must be a range of 3D points and corresponding 3D normal vectors whose iterator type is RandomAccessIterator . PointMap a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the PointRange and value type is GeomTraits::Point_3 NormalMap a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the PointRange and value type is GeomTraits::Vector_3 IntersectionKernel must be a model of Kernel using exact computations. Defaults to CGAL::Exact_predicates_exact_constructions_kernel . Used for the internal kinetic shape partition.

members.name: Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3
members.detailed: points an instance of PointRange with 3D points and corresponding 3D normal vectors. np a sequence of Named Parameters among the ones listed below Optional Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> point_map </button> a property map associating points to the elements of the point set points Type: a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the iterator of PointRange and whose value type is GeomTraits::Point_3 Default: PointMap()
members.definition: CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3< GeomTraits, PointRange, PointMap, NormalMap, IntersectionKernel >::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3

members.name: detect_planar_shapes
members.brief: detects shapes in the provided point cloud and regularizes them.
members.detailed: NamedParameters a sequence of Named Parameters np an instance of NamedParameters . Optional Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> point_map </button> a property map associating points to the elements of the point set points Type: a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the iterator of PointRange and whose value type is GeomTraits::Point_3 Default: PointMap() <button class="collapsible"> normal_map </button> a property map associating normals to the elements of the point set points Type: a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the iterator of PointRange and whose value type is GeomTraits::Vector_3 Default: NormalMap() <button class="collapsible"> k_neighbors </button> Shape detection: the number of neighbors for each point considered during region growing Type: std::size_t Default: 12 <button class="collapsible"> maximum_distance </button> Shape detection: the maximum distance from a point to a plane Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 2% of bounding box diagonal <button class="collapsible"> maximum_angle </button> Shape detection: maximum angle in degrees between the normal of a point and the plane normal Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 15 degrees <button class="collapsible"> minimum_region_size </button> Shape detection: minimum number of 3D points a region must have Type: std::size_t Default: 0.5% of input points <button class="collapsible"> angle_tolerance </button> Shape regularization: maximum allowed angle in degrees between plane normals used for parallelism, orthogonality, and axis symmetry Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 5 degrees <button class="collapsible"> maximum_offset </button> Shape regularization: maximum allowed orthogonal distance between two parallel planes such that they are considered to be coplanar Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 0.5% of bounding box diagonal <button class="collapsible"> regularize_parallelism </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether parallelism should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> regularize_orthogonality </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether orthogonality should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> regularize_coplanarity </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether coplanarity should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: true <button class="collapsible"> regularize_axis_symmetry </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether axis symmetry should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> symmetry_direction </button> Shape regularization: an axis for symmetry regularization Type: GeomTraits::Vector_3 Default: Z axis that is GeomTraits::Vector_3(0, 0, 1)
members.definition: std::size_t CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3< GeomTraits, PointRange, PointMap, NormalMap, IntersectionKernel >::detect_planar_shapes

members.name: detection_and_partition
members.brief: detects and regularizes shapes in the provided point cloud and creates the kinetic space partition.
members.detailed: Combines calls of detect_planar_shapes() , initialize_partition() and partition() . NamedParameters a sequence of Named Parameters k maximum number of allowed intersections for each input polygon before its expansion stops. np an instance of NamedParameters . Optional Named Parameters <button class="collapsible"> point_map </button> a property map associating points to the elements of the point set points Type: a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the iterator of PointRange and whose value type is GeomTraits::Point_3 Default: PointMap() <button class="collapsible"> normal_map </button> a property map associating normals to the elements of the point set points Type: a model of ReadablePropertyMap whose key type is the value type of the iterator of PointRange and whose value type is GeomTraits::Vector_3 Default: NormalMap() <button class="collapsible"> k_neighbors </button> Shape detection: the number of neighbors for each point considered during region growing Type: std::size_t Default: 12 <button class="collapsible"> maximum_distance </button> Shape detection: the maximum distance from a point to a plane Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 2% of bounding box diagonal <button class="collapsible"> maximum_angle </button> Shape detection: maximum angle in degrees between the normal of a point and the plane normal Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 15 degrees <button class="collapsible"> minimum_region_size </button> Shape detection: minimum number of 3D points a region must have Type: std::size_t Default: 0.5% of input points <button class="collapsible"> angle_tolerance </button> Shape regularization: maximum allowed angle in degrees between plane normals used for parallelism, orthogonality, and axis symmetry Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 5 degrees <button class="collapsible"> maximum_offset </button> Shape regularization: maximum allowed orthogonal distance between two parallel planes such that they are considered to be coplanar Type: GeomTraits::FT Default: 0.5% of bounding box diagonal <button class="collapsible"> regularize_parallelism </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether parallelism should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> regularize_orthogonality </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether orthogonality should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> regularize_coplanarity </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether coplanarity should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: true <button class="collapsible"> regularize_axis_symmetry </button> Shape regularization: indicates whether axis symmetry should be regularized or not Type: boolean Default: false <button class="collapsible"> symmetry_direction </button> Shape regularization: an axis for symmetry regularization Type: GeomTraits::Vector_3 Default: Z axis that is GeomTraits::Vector_3(0, 0, 1) <button class="collapsible"> reorient_bbox </button> Use the oriented bounding box instead of the axis-aligned bounding box. Type: bool Default: false <button class="collapsible"> bbox_dilation_ratio </button> Factor for extension of the bounding box of the input data to be used for the partition. Type: FT Default: 1.1

members.definition: const KSP & CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3< GeomTraits, PointRange, PointMap, NormalMap, IntersectionKernel >::kinetic_partition

members.name: reconstruct_with_ground
members.brief: uses min-cut to solve an inside/outside labeling of the volumes of the kinetic partition and provides the reconstructed surface as a list of indexed polygons.
members.detailed: Estimates a horizontal ground plane within the detected shapes. Cells in the partition below the ground plane receive a weight to be labeled as inside. The z axis is considered as vertical upwards pointing. OutputPointIterator an output iterator taking Point_3 . OutputPolygonIterator an output iterator taking polygon indices std::vector<std::size_t> . lambda trades data faithfulness of the reconstruction for low complexity. Must be in the range [0, 1) . pit output iterator to receive the vertices of the reconstructed surface. polyit output iterator to store all polygonal faces of the reconstructed surface. partition created
members.definition: void CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3< GeomTraits, PointRange, PointMap, NormalMap, IntersectionKernel >::reconstruct_with_ground

members.name: reconstruct
members.brief: uses min-cut to solve an inside/outside labeling of the volumes of the kinetic partition and provides the reconstructed surface as a list of indexed polygons.
members.detailed: The external_nodes parameter allows to indicate the preferred labels for faces on the bounding box. OutputPointIterator an output iterator taking Point_3 . OutputPolygonIterator an output iterator taking polygon indices std::vector<std::size_t> . lambda trades data faithfulness of the reconstruction for low complexity. Must be in the range [0, 1) . external_nodes adds label preference for the faces on the bounding box. Bounding box sides without preset label are chosen by the min-cut. Setting external_nodes[ZMIN] = true sets the inside label as the preferred label for the ZMIN side of the bounding box. pit output iterator to receive the vertices of the reconstructed surface. polyit output iterator to store all polygonal faces of the reconstructed surface. partition created
members.definition: void CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3< GeomTraits, PointRange, PointMap, NormalMap, IntersectionKernel >::reconstruct
members.argsstring: (FT lambda, std::map< typename KSP::Face_support, bool > external_nodes, OutputPointIterator pit, OutputPolygonIterator polyit)

members.name: setup_energyterms
members.brief: creates the visibility (data-) and regularity energy terms from the input point cloud and the kinetic partition.
members.definition: void CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3< GeomTraits, PointRange, PointMap, NormalMap, IntersectionKernel >::setup_energyterms

members.name: setup_energyterms
members.brief: provides the data and regularity energy terms for reconstruction via min-cut.
members.detailed: edges contains a vector of pairs of volume indices. Indicates which volumes should be connected in the min-cut formulation. edge_costs contains the cost for each edge specified in edges for two labels with different labels. For equal labels, the cost is 0. Needs to be index compatible to the edges parameter. cost_matrix provides the cost of a label for each volume cell. The first index corresponds to the label and the second index corresponds to the volume index. fails if the dimensions of parameters does not match the kinetic partition. successful initialization
members.definition: bool CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3< GeomTraits, PointRange, PointMap, NormalMap, IntersectionKernel >::setup_energyterms
members.argsstring: (const std::vector< std::pair< std::size_t, std::size_t > > &edges, const std::vector< double > &edge_costs, const std::vector< std::vector< double > > &cost_matrix)

members.detailed: pit an output iterator taking Point_3 . triit an output iterator taking std::size_t. successful reconstruction

members.name: reconstructed_model_polylist_lcc
members.brief: provides the reconstructed surface as a list of indexed polygons.
members.detailed: pit an output iterator taking Point_3 . polyit an output iterator taking std::vector<std::size_t>. lambda trades data faithfulness of the reconstruction for low complexity. Must be in the range [0, 1) . successful reconstruction

PkgKineticSurfaceReconstructionRef.name: PkgKineticSurfaceReconstructionRef
PkgKineticSurfaceReconstructionRef.detailed: Sven Oesau and Florent Lafarge The package implements a piece-wise planar surface reconstruction pipeline from point clouds combining methods from the Shape Detection, Shape Regularization and Kinetic Shape Partition packages and graph-cut. Introduced in: CGAL 6.0 Depends on: PkgKineticSpacePartition, PkgSurfaceMesh, PkgLinearCellComplex, PkgShapeDetection BibTeX: cgal:ol-kinetic-reconstruction-26a License: GPL Classified Reference Pages Classes CGAL::Kinetic_surface_reconstruction_3
